items.title: The $27 million Al proxy war over Alex Bores ends in a draw
items.summary: The expensive, $27 million political proxy war between Anthropic and OpenAI came to a draw last night when Alex Bores, a New York state Assemblyman whose popularity surged after being targeted by a pro-AI super PAC, narrowly lost the Democratic primary to represent New York's 12th Congressional district. Prior to the race, Bores, a former […]

items.title: Stripe, Anthropic, and OpenAI are backing an effort to stop respiratory infections
items.summary: The common cold comes for us all—often more than once a year. And there is no way to prevent it. The best you can do is take vitamin C and stay away from people with the sniffles. Now the payment company Stripe, founded by brothers Patrick and John Collison, says it will fund a new…

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip

items.title: Google is finally opening the Play Store to outside payments
